kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Exactly two of the artisan with the Awl, the artisan with the Chisel, the artisan in Oldwall, and the artisan with 18 coins belong to the Joiners' Guild.
Between Bridgegate and Southgate, one goes with Cooper and the other with 18 coins.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is lower than both Matilda and the Tanner.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with Fletcher; Mason goes with 16 coins; Riverside goes with 18 coins.
If at least one of Chisel goes with 16 coins, Bridgegate goes with 16 coins, or Hammer goes with Bridgegate, then Southgate goes with Cedric.
The Fletcher's levy is at least 5 coins more than the artisan with the Hammer.
Rowan goes with at least two of Fletcher, Needle, Riverside, and 20 coins.
Beatrix goes with at least three of Weaver, Chisel, Bridgegate, and 16 coins.
Either 16 coins goes with Riverside or someone in the Ironmongers' Guild goes with 20 coins.
Exactly two of (the members of the Ironmongers' Guild, the artisan with 12 coins, and the artisan with 14 coins) belong to the River Ward.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Exactly two of the angler using the Crankbait, the angler using the Spinnerbait, the angler at Grayreach, and the catch with 5 lb belong to the Pike Family.
Between Birchpool and Pinehollow, one goes with Bass and the other with 5 lb.
The angler at Foxglen's weight is lower than both Mabel and the angler who landed the Crappie.
Exactly one of these is true: Esther goes with Bluegill; Catfish goes with 4 lb; Mossbank goes with 5 lb.
If at least one of Spinnerbait goes with 4 lb, Birchpool goes with 4 lb, or Spoon goes with Birchpool, then Pinehollow goes with Esther.
The angler who landed the Bluegill's weight is at least 3 lb more than the angler using the Spoon.
Royce goes with at least two of Bluegill, Wobbler, Mossbank, and 6 lb.
Cody goes with at least three of Perch, Spinnerbait, Birchpool, and 4 lb.
Either 4 lb goes with Mossbank or someone in the Catfish Family goes with 6 lb.
Exactly two of (the members of the Catfish Family, the catch with 2 lb, and the catch with 3 lb) belong to the North Watershed.
